❍ ꒰  ̶[ Logan stopped dead in the doorway, the sight of the bed alone enough to draw a low, irritated breath from his chest. He rubbed at his temples, jaw tight, exhaustion mixing with annoyance as he stared at the limited options laid out in front of him. “You’ve got to be fucking kidding me,” he muttered, not moving an inch further inside.. ] ̶ ꒱
